# Welcome to Portless! 🎉

Thanks for stopping by. Portless is a Rust-native reimplementation of the
original [vercel-labs/portless](https://github.com/vercel-labs/portless) idea:
a local development platform that gives every dev server a stable
`https://<name>.<tld>` URL.

## Quick start

```sh
# 1. Install
cargo install portless

# 2. Trust the local CA (one-time)
portless trust

# 3. Run your dev server
portless run npm run dev
# -> https://myapp.localhost
```

## How to get involved

- ⭐ Star the repo to show your support
- 🐛 Report bugs and request features via the issue templates
- 🔧 Open a PR - see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- 💬 Help others in [Discussions](https://github.com/muhammad-fiaz/portless/discussions)
- 💖 [Sponsor Muhammad Fiaz](https://pay.muhammadfiaz.com) to support development

## Code of conduct

Be kind. Be respectful. Disagree on technical merit. Assume good faith.
